scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: every endpoint documented at developer.aircall.io/api-references/ (User V1/V2, Team, Call, Conversation Intelligence, Dialer Campaign, Number, Message, Contact, Tag, Webhook, Company, Integration, AI Voice Agent, Analytics) is enumerated below. 7 GET list resources are streams (calls, users, contacts, numbers, teams, tags, webhooks); 15 dialect-expressible mutations are writes.json actions (users, teams, contacts, tags, webhooks, plus call archive/unarchive/comment/tag). Legacy was fully read-only (capabilities.write:false); this pass flips capabilities.write to true. Live outbound-call/dialer/messaging/conversation-intelligence/analytics-export endpoints remain excluded (see per-endpoint reasons) as they either mutate live telephony state, require a call already in progress, or return async/binary artifacts rather than syncable list data.

excluded.reason: single-user detail; the users stream already covers the list data
real-time presence/availability snapshot, not a syncable historical record stream

v2 list is the same User resource as the v1 users stream with a different envelope; v1 is covered, v2 is not separately migrated
v2 single-user detail; covered by the v1 users stream
v2 create is the same operation as write action create_user (v1); not separately migrated
v2 update is the same operation as write action update_user (v1); not separately migrated
per-user number assignment sub-resource; the numbers stream already covers all number records
single-team detail; the teams stream already covers the list data
single-call detail; the calls stream already covers the list data

transfers a live in-progress call to another agent/number; a real-time telephony action, not a data mutation
